title: V0 Component Generator for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# V0 Component Generator for Claude
Generate production-ready React components from natural language using V0.dev patterns with shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, and TypeScript
**Category:** commands
**Author:** JSONbored
**Tags:** `v0` `ui-generation` `shadcn` `react` `tailwind`

## Install
```bash
/v0-generate [options] <component_description>
```

## Usage
/v0-generate [options] <component_description>
